# Arnaud Wiehe

> Cybersecurity executive, author, and international speaker specializing in AI governance, emerging technologies, and digital risk.

## Who

Arnaud Wiehe is Managing Director of Information Security and AI Governance. He holds AIGP, CISSP, CCSP, CISM, CISA, and CIPP/E certifications. With over two decades of experience, he helps organizations translate complex technological change into clear, actionable business strategy.

## Topics

- AI governance and risk management
- Cybersecurity leadership and strategy
- Emerging technology risk (AI, quantum, XR)
- Board-level technology governance
- Agent governance and runtime controls
- EU AI Act compliance
- CISO leadership and operating models

## Books

- **The Book on Cybersecurity**: How Nontechnical Corporate Leaders and Boards Can Manage in a Scary Digital World
- **Emerging Tech, Emerging Threats**: A Cybersecurity Guide for Innovative Leaders

## Speaking

GITEX Global Dubai, World Summit AI, Economist Metaverse Summit, ISACA Risk Events, Next IT Security Stockholm. Topics: AI governance, cybersecurity strategy, emerging technology leadership.

## Articles

Published at https://arnaudwiehe.com/articles/ — covering AI governance, agent security, vendor risk, vulnerability management, and board oversight.

## Credentials

AIGP · CISSP · CCSP · CISM · CISA · CIPP/E
